title: PORTLAND GENERAL ELECTRIC - 211info
text: PORTLAND GENERAL ELECTRIC PORTLAND GENERAL ELECTRIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information about electric service, bill payment assistance, and possible discounts. 121 SW Salmon Street Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Portland General Electric customers Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-7pm (503) 228-6322 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 228-6322 Customer Service Main phone (503) 399-7717 Salem report an outage Toll-free (800) 542-8818 Customer Service INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Russian AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Columbia, Marion, Multnomah, Polk, Washington, and Yamhill Counties Services: Electric Service Connection/Repair Electric Service Providers Utility Bill Payment Plans Utility Service Complaints Other Services Offered At This Location: UTILITIES - INCOME-QUALIFIED BILL DISCOUNT PROGRAM UTILITIES - PUBLIC SAFETY POWER SHUTOFFS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
